title: ipomoea dalzellii var. inaequalis
intro: Ipomoea dalzellii var. inaequalis, also known as the Himalayan morning glory, is a plant species belonging to the Convolvulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as supporting respiratory and digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
